abilities.name: Black Blood Resistance
abilities.description: Reduce all Black Blood damage by 1 (minimum 0).

abilities.name: Gunfighter
abilities.description: May use Pistols as if Range y2.

abilities.name: Stubborn
abilities.description: Enemy characters suffer - to attack flips resisted by Willpower.

actions: (1) Weshorn & Smitte #3 (Pistol) | AV: 7 (14) | Rg: y2 or z10 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Capacity 6, Reload 1. Ram Critical Strike: +1 per Ram. Mask Trigger Happy: Take another Ranged attack.
(2) Rapid Fire | Discard Twist to take three (1) AP attacks vs single target.
(0) Shrug Off | Discard card to end a Condition.
(0) Big Damn Hero | If outnumbered or vs Nephilim, discard card for 1 General AP.
system.notes: Freelance bounty hunters with Guild backing, authorized to hunt and destroy Nephilim.
